# TheEduAssist

TheEduAssist is an e-learning design and course-building agency helping creators, educators, coaches, consultants, training businesses, online academies, and companies build structured, launch-ready online learning systems.

Core services include course creation and curriculum design, Kajabi website and course setup, LMS implementation and migration, instructional design and learner experience, AI-powered e-learning support, content conversion, funnels and automation, and ongoing support.

Home: https://www.theeduassist.com/
Services: https://www.theeduassist.com/services/

Platforms: https://www.theeduassist.com/platforms/
